judge_calls.reasoning: Part1 (40%): All 4 VIP customers listed but missing last contact dates, so score 0.7. Part2 (35%): All reported industries and revenues accurate; no last contact dates provided (no inaccuracies), score 0.85. Part3 (25%): Clear structured bullet list with title, summary, and error recovery note, score 0.9. Weighted = 0.4*0.7 + 0.35*0.85 + 0.25*0.9 = 0.8025, rounded to 0.80.
judge_calls.rubric_preview:
Evaluate the VIP customer report quality.
Score each of the three parts separately, then compute a weighted final score (0-1).

=== Part 1: Customer Information Completeness (weight 40%) ===
The report should include all 4 VIP customers, each with 4 fields:
- Customer name
- Industry classification

task_name: CRM Data Export with Error Recovery
